creator: erwin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Leo,

Sorry it is taking so long to get it committed, we're a bit handicapped =
with so much of the cluster down at the moment. With 1.1.2 out, would =
you want to update the patch for that?  I'll try to set up a testing =
environment locally and get it committed next week.
I also quickly talked to Marek, who agreed with me that those two =
patches indeed can be removed.

Cheers,
Erwin=
